title: ocimum dambicola
intro: Ocimum dambicola, also known as the 'Wild Basil' or 'Dambala', is a species of plant in the family Lamiaceae, which belongs to the Ocimum genus and is native to tropical Africa. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Ocimum dambicola include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. Traditionally, the plant is prepared in various herbal forms such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
